source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The hydraulic piston/cylinder system shown in the figure has a cylinder diameter of D=0.1 m with a piston and rod mass of 25 kg. The rod has a diameter of 0.01 m with an outside atmospheric pressure of 101 kPa. The inside hydraulic fluid pressure is 250 kPa. How large a force can the rod push with in the upward direction?
